site.name: JSON Explorer
site.description: Explore, analyse, diff, transform and visualise JSON instantly — all in your browser, no data leaves your machine. A free tool by Mightora.io.

hero.heading: JSON Explorer
hero.description: Parse, explore, diff, transform and visualise JSON instantly. Everything runs in your browser — your data never leaves your machine.

author.name: Ian Tweedie
author.role: Power Platform Architect | Developer | Technology Consultant
author.bio: Ian Tweedie is a technology consultant and developer based in North East England. He creates free developer tools through Mightora and shares knowledge via the TechTweedie blog and YouTube channel.

metadata.ogTitle: JSON Explorer — Mightora.io Free Developer Tools
